name: python_execute
description: Execute Python code in a sandboxed environment. TO READ DATA FILES use the DATA_DIR env variable — it points to the worker's domain_data folder. Example: df = pd.read_csv(f"{os.environ['DATA_DIR']}/iris/iris_combined.csv"). Do NOT import duckdb, sqlalchemy, or any DB connector — they are not installed. Use the duckdb_query tool to fetch data into rows/columns first, then reconstruct a DataFrame: df = pd.DataFrame(rows, columns=columns). Available libraries: pandas, numpy, scipy, matplotlib, plotly, openpyxl, pyarrow, statsmodels, scikit-learn, arch, riskfolio, networkx, xarray. No network access. Timeout: 60s. Use plotly for charts — call fig.show() to render in the canvas panel.
